text: I would like to investigate the mechanism of healing using the crystallized healer. I'm going to make a statement and I would appreciate if you would correct my thinking. It seems to me that once the healer has become properly balanced and unblocked with respect to energy centers. It is possible for him to act in some way as a collector and focuser of light, the same way that are analogous to the way that a pyramid works, taking or collecting light through the left hand and emitting it through the right. This then somehow penetrating the first and seventh chakra envelope, vibratory envelope, you might say, in the body, and allowing for the realignment of the energy centers of the entity to be healed. I'm quite sure that I'm not exactly correct in this and possibly considerably often. Could you uh rearrange my thinking so that it uh makes sense? I am well, you are correct in your assumption that the crystallized healer is analogous to the pyramidal action of the king's chamber position. There are a few adjustments we might suggest firstly the energy which is used is brought into the field complex of the healer by the outstretched hand used in a polarized sense. However, this energy circulates through the various points of energy to the base of the spine, and to a certain extent the feet, thus coming through the main energy centers of the healer, a spiraling through of the feet, a turning at the red energy center towards a spiral at the yellow energy, the center, and passing a roo of a a green energy center in a microcosm of the king's chamber energy configuration of prana. This then continuing for the third spiral through the a blue energy, the center, and being ascent there from through the gateway back to intelligent infinity. It is from the green center that the healing prana moves into the a polarized healing, a right, a hand, and a therefrom a to the one, a to be healed. We may note that there are some who use the yellow ray configuration to transfer energy, and this may be done, but the effects are questionable and with regard to the relationship between the healer, the healing energy and the seeker questionable due to the propensity for the seeker to continue requiring such energy of transfers without any true healing taking place in the absence of the healer due to the lack of penetration of the armoring shell of which you spoke.

segment.segment: I would like to investigate the mechanism of healing using the crystallized healer.
I'm going to make a statement and I would appreciate if you would correct my thinking.
It seems to me that once the healer has become properly balanced and unblocked with respect to energy centers.

It is possible for him to act in some way as a collector and focuser of light, the same way that are analogous to the way that a pyramid works, taking or collecting light through the left hand and emitting it through the right.
This then somehow penetrating the first and seventh chakra envelope, vibratory envelope, you might say, in the body, and allowing for the realignment of the energy centers of the entity to be healed.
I'm quite sure that I'm not exactly correct in this and possibly considerably often.
Could you uh rearrange my thinking so that it uh makes sense?
I am well, you are correct in your assumption that the crystallized healer is analogous to the pyramidal action of the king's chamber position.
There are a few adjustments we might suggest firstly the energy which is used is brought into the field complex of the healer by the outstretched hand used in a polarized sense.

However, this energy circulates through the various points of energy to the base of the spine, and to a certain extent the feet, thus coming through the main energy centers of the healer, a spiraling through of the feet, a turning at the red energy center towards a spiral at the yellow energy, the center, and passing a roo of a a green energy center in a microcosm of the king's chamber energy configuration of prana.
This then continuing for the third spiral through the a blue energy, the center, and being ascent there from through the gateway back to intelligent infinity.
It is from the green center that the healing prana moves into the a polarized healing, a right, a hand, and a therefrom a to the one, a to be healed.

We may note that there are some who use the yellow ray configuration to transfer energy, and this may be done, but the effects are questionable and with regard to the relationship between the healer, the healing energy and the seeker questionable due to the propensity for the seeker to continue requiring such energy of transfers without any true healing taking place in the absence of the healer due to the lack of penetration of the armoring shell of which you spoke.
